title: Trade Table
description: Defines the items a villager or wandering trader can offer in trades.

format_version.description: The format version of the trade table. Use 1.21.80 for strict chance check.

tiers.description: A list of tiers that define the trades available at each level.

weight.description: The weight/probability of this trade table being selected when multiple tables exist (e.g., for wandering traders).

tier.title: Tier
tier.description: A tier of trades that unlocks as the villager gains experience.

groups.description: A list of trade groups for this tier. Groups allow selecting a subset of trades per interaction.

total_exp_required.description: The total experience required to unlock this tier.

trades.description: A list of trades available in this tier. Only one of 'groups' or 'trades' should be used.

group.title: Group
group.description: A group of trades where a limited number can be selected per interaction.

num_to_select.description: The number of trades to select from this group each time the trades refresh.

trades.description: A list of trades in this group.

trade.title: Trade
trade.description: A single trade offer between a villager and a player.

wants.description: The items the villager wants in exchange. Usually 1 item, but can be 2 for some trades.

gives.description: The items the villager gives to the player.

max_uses.description: The maximum number of times this trade can be used before it is exhausted.

reward_exp.description: Whether this trade rewards the villager with experience when used.

trader_exp.description: The amount of experience the villager gains when this trade is used.

trade_item.title: Trade Item
trade_item.description: An item involved in a trade, either wanted or given.

oneOf.title: Quantity Range
oneOf.description: A range of possible quantities for the item.

quantity.description: The quantity of the item, either as a fixed number or a range.

price_multiplier.description: A multiplier that adjusts the price based on demand and other factors.

filters.description: Filters that define additional conditions for this trade item.

functions.description: Array of functions to apply to the trade item, such as enchantments.

choice.description: Alternative items that can be traded. Allows the player to choose from multiple options.
